ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (World) View this [Drawing of a Musketeer](https://www.metmuseum.org/art/collection/search/410811).
[ ] (World) Learn more about the [Evolution of Frigates in the Age of Sail](https://www.usni.org/magazines/naval-history-magazine/2023/april/evolution-frigates-age-sail).
[ ] (World) Learn more about the [types of ships](https://www.mq.edu.au/macquarie-archive/journeys/ships/vessels.html) in the 1700s.

[ ] (World) Explore how one Londoner coped with the Great Plague:**  **[Samuel Pepys and the Great Plague](https://www.rmg.co.uk/stories/blog/curatorial/god-preserve-us-all-samuel-pepys-great-plague?_gl=1*ihh7nk*_up*MQ..*_ga*MjA1NzQ1ODQxOC4xNzQ2NDU4MjM3*_ga_7JJ3J5DBF6*czE3NDY0NTgyMzYkbzEkZzEkdDE3NDY0NTgzMjQkajAkbDAkaDA.*_ga_4MH5VEZTEK*czE3NDY0NTgyMzYkbzEkZzEkdDE3NDY0NTgzMjQkajAkbDAkaDA.).
[ ] (World) Read more about the forming of the [United Kingdom](https://www.history.com/articles/united-kingdom-scotland-northern-ireland-wales).

[ ] (World) Watch [video](https://youtu.be/JZSajBakGK4?si=5TXskRozL7NOfTMs) demonstrating Boyle’s Law.
[ ] (World) Explore the [Royal Society’s](https://makingscience.royalsociety.org/people/na8137/robert-boyle) information on Robert Boyle, including letters and drawings.
[ ] (World) Explore the history of the [Royal Society](https://www.sciencemuseum.org.uk/objects-and-stories/17th-century-society-transformed-science#:~:text=The%20Royal%20Society%20coalesced%20from,learned%20society%20dedicated%20to%20science.).

resources.title: Napoleon and the Battle of Waterloo
resources.author: Frances Winwar

resources.title: The Met Hokusai: He Saw the World in a Wave
resources.author: Susie Hodge
